rationale: Both evaluations land on the identical score (4/10) and reach the same core conclusion: a strong individual contributor lacking formal people-management experience, mobile-platform depth, and roadmap/org-change leadership for an Engineering Manager role. The wording differs (e.g. '12+ years' vs '13+ years', added mention of MCP code generators), but these are ordinary run-to-run rephrasings and if anything slightly more generous in the variant. No concern, score change, or shift in reasoning keys off the name change from a Western to a Chinese name.
